race.comment: COZZIES CHOICE (5) ran a nice race last time out, beaten only half a length over 1100m at this track. Has a handy 2kg claim and is heading in the right direction. Has been kept on the fresh side and rates to go close. KARRI ON (7) disappointed last time in stronger but made solid inroads when beaten just 1.4L prior. Rates well and has winning claims. GOLD LIGHTNING (1) was on pace and deserved her Maiden win 23 days ago. Draws to control the race and won't have to improve much to threaten. WEAPONIZE (9) resumed in good order and has more up the sleeve. In the mix with average luck from an awkward barrier. RULE THE REALM (2) finds easier and quick improvement wouldn't surprise.
